author: codeprakhar25
name: Full-Model Depth Recurrence Ablation (7x2)
blurb: Systematic ablation of full-model depth recurrence (N unique blocks × R repeats) with U-Net skip connections. 7 configs tested. Best: 7×2 = 1.3680 BPB (+0.036 vs baseline) at 26% smaller artifact. Key finding: torch.compile shows NO slowdown with depth recurrence, contradicting prior reports.
